title: gronophyllum pleurocarpum
intro: Gronophyllum pleurocarpum, also known as the Philippine or Philippine tree, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of the Philippines and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Gronophyllum pleurocarpum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, while its essential oil is used in aromatherapy and topical applications.
